architecture_intent:
Act as a Principal ML Infrastructure Engineer. Your task is to design an orchestration pipeline for Distributed Machine Learning workloads using AWS Step Functions, explicitly interacting with AWS Lambda and Amazon S3. The architecture must strictly utilize Declarative AWS Serverless Application Model (SAM) CloudFormation YAML structure.

Generate a complete, valid AWS SAM template starting with 'Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31'. You must provision an AWS::Serverless::StateMachine that defines an algorithmic orchestration loop natively embedded natively in the template. The flow must coordinate data extraction natively pulled from an Amazon S3 Bucket to AWS Lambda processing nodes. Ensure the S3 Bucket strictly adheres to enterprise security rules by enforcing ServerSideEncryptionByDefault utilizing standard AES256 encryption.

Act as a Cloud Architect specializing in highly available GenAI systems. Design a Multi-Region Serverless RAG backend using Declarative AWS SAM CloudFormation YAML. This architecture is intended for a financial RAG chatbot requiring instantaneous low latency access.

Generate a complete, valid AWS SAM template using 'Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31'. You must implement an AWS::Serverless::SimpleTable or DynamoDB equivalent to store chat history locally. To handle the orchestration, deploy an AWS::Serverless::Function executing a generic Python runtime that acts as the RAG inference engine. Enforce strict least-privilege IAM controls by granting this Lambda function targeted Policies (e.g., DynamoDBCrudPolicy). Expose this backend dynamically to web clients by provisioning an AWS::Serverless::Api REST endpoint triggering the Lambda explicitly on POST requests.

Act as a Zero-Trust Security Architect. Design a strictly MVSP-compliant Data Lake using Declarative AWS Serverless Application Model (SAM) CloudFormation YAML, where physical security tracking is prioritized above all else.

Generate a complete, valid AWS SAM template using 'Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31'. Start by provisioning a structural Amazon S3 object. To adhere natively to strict HIPAA and WAFR bounds, this bucket must unequivocally contain a BucketEncryption property utilizing server side default encryption rules. Expose access to this data natively via an AWS::Serverless::Function that relies explicitly on heavily restricted inline IAM boundaries, avoiding all wildcard actions entirely to prevent unauthorized access vectors.

Act as a specialized GenAI Architect. Design an Event-Driven Asynchronous Agent Swarm routing mechanism natively mapping declarative AWS SAM CloudFormation YAML primitives parallelizing heavy batch tasks safely.

Generate a complete, valid AWS SAM template using 'Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31'. Establish the asynchronous backbone by provisioning a primary AWS::SQS::Queue alongside a secondary target Queue. For the compute layer, deploy an AWS::Serverless::Function representing the core parallel worker execution nodes dynamically triggered by AWS::Serverless::Function Events directly mapped to the SQS queue mapping execution throughput implicitly. Configure the Lambda properties utilizing explicit Environment blocks routing the queue attributes securely to runtime scripts.
